message.content:
@startuml
participant "E" as Points
    Points value := Int
    Points value := "LOVE"
    Points value := "FIFTEEN"
    Points value := "THIRTY"
    Points next() := Points

participant "C" as ByPoints
    ByPoints placard := "$A - $B"
    ByPoints next() := Score

participant "A" as Score
    Score placard := String
    Score isGame := Boolean := false
    Score next() := Score

participant "O" as Deuce
    Deuce placard := "Deuce"
    Deuce next() := Score

participant "E" as Player
    Player o A := A
    Player o B := B

participant "C" as Forty
    Forty placard := "$A - 40" | "40 - $B"
    Forty next() := Score

participant "C" as Game
    Game placard := "Game $W"
    Game isGame := true
    Game next() := throw

participant "C" as Advantage
    Advantage placard := "Advantage $W"
    Advantage next() := Score

    Points -- pointsA : pointsA
    Points -- pointsB : pointsB
    ByPoints -- pointsOther : pointsOther
    Score -- player : player
    Score -- player : player
    Player -- winner : winner
    Player -- player : player
    Forty -- player : player
    Game -- player : player
    Advantage -- player : player

    Deuce o Score : Score
    Score o Score : Score
    Score o Score : Score
    Score o Score : Score
    Score o Score : Score
    Score o Score : Score
